headline: AMGN Trading Above 50 & 200-Day SMA: How to Play the Stock?
summary: Amgen stock holds above key SMAs as strong drug sales, biosimilars, and MariTide pipeline momentum offset looming patent losses and pricing headwinds.

raw.headline: AMGN Trading Above 50 & 200-Day SMA: How to Play the Stock?
raw.summary: Amgen stock holds above key SMAs as strong drug sales, biosimilars, and MariTide pipeline momentum offset looming patent losses and pricing headwinds.

headline: FDA approves higher dose version of weight loss drug Wegovy as Novo Nordisk tries to win back market share
summary: The high-dose Wegovy helped patients with obesity lose an average 20.7% of their weight after 72 weeks in a phase three trial.

raw.headline: FDA approves higher dose version of weight loss drug Wegovy as Novo Nordisk tries to win back market share
raw.summary: The high-dose Wegovy helped patients with obesity lose an average 20.7% of their weight after 72 weeks in a phase three trial.

headline: Mark Cuban Refuses To 'Rip On' TrumpRx, Lauds It For Saving 'A Lot Of ' Patients' Money
summary: Mark Cuban, billionaire entrepreneur and CEO of Costplusdrugs.com, praised TrumpRx, a prescription drug platform launched by President Donald Trump, for its efforts in reducing the cost of certain medications for patients.

raw.headline: Mark Cuban Refuses To 'Rip On' TrumpRx, Lauds It For Saving 'A Lot Of ' Patients' Money
raw.summary: Mark Cuban, billionaire entrepreneur and CEO of Costplusdrugs.com, praised TrumpRx, a prescription drug platform launched by President Donald Trump, for its efforts in reducing the cost of certain medications for patients.
